items.title: Frozen Frost High-Fashion Portrait
items.description: Create a cinematic high-fashion winter close-up portrait with an ethereal frozen aesthetic. Featuring delicate frost textures, crystalline details, and a soft iridescent glow, this prompt captures a surreal balance of beauty, fragility, and power.
items.prompt: Zoom into as fill the face, direct opposite shot, neutral look. After that, ahigh-fashion winter portrait — ethereal and crystalline. A close-up of a woman’s face covered in shimmering frost, her eyes framed by frozen lashes that sparkle like glass filaments. The texture of the frost delicately outlines her cheekbones and lips, creating a surreal balance between fragility and power. Her skin glows with porcelain smoothness beneath layers of ice crystals, while faint pink undertones on her lips bring warmth to the otherwise glacial palette. The light is soft and diffused, reflecting through the frost to create a dreamlike, iridescent glow. The overall tone blends cold whites, pale blues, and hints of silver, evoking the atmosphere of an enchanted winter world — a cinematic vision of frozen beauty suspended between life and ice.
items.keywords: winter portrait, frost, ice crystals, high fashion, close up face, ethereal beauty, frozen aesthetic, pale tones, cinematic lighting, porcelain skin, surreal photography

Lighting is soft, diffused, and luminous, scattering through the frost to create a dreamlike iridescent glow. items.title: Luxury Snow SUV Winter Editorial
items.description: Create a high-end winter fashion editorial scene with a luxury SUV in a snowy pine forest while strictly preserving the subject’s identity. Featuring bold red accents, soft snowfall, and cinematic lighting, this prompt delivers a powerful and elegant winter aesthetic.
items.prompt:
"{
“reference_constraints”: “Use the uploaded person as the ONLY face & hair reference. Do NOT change identity, facial geometry, age, skin tone, hair color/length/parting, or makeup. Keep hairstyle exactly like the reference.”,
“expression”: “Confident, poised, subtle sultry gaze; relaxed mouth with a soft smile (classy, not exaggerated).”,
“scene”: “Daytime winter road in a snowy pine forest. Heavy but graceful snowfall. Subject is seated at the open driver door of a shiny red, boxy luxury SUV Mercedes G class. Vehicle must be generic/de-branded with no readable logos or license plate.”,
“composition”: {
“framing”: “Vertical 9:16, three-quarter to full-body crop.”,
“camera_angle”: “Slightly low angle to lengthen the legs; eye level close to subject.”,
“subject_position”: “Centered slightly right, seated sideways on the door sill/seat with doors open; eyes in sharp focus.”,
“depth_of_field”: “Background softly blurred; subject crisp; foreground snowflakes visible.”
},
“wardrobe”: [
“White faux-fur jacket, plush and voluminous.”,
“Cream/white mini dress or skirt set underneath (clean lines; fitted).”,
“Glossy red high-heeled knee-to-over-knee boots with pointed toe.”,
“Red leather gloves.”,
“White fur pillbox/ushanka hat.”,
“Small white quilted chain-strap handbag (gold chain) resting from the hand.”,
“Minimal gold jewelry (earrings, slim watch).”
],
“pose”: “Seated sideways with one leg extended and pointed toe, the other bent; left hand resting on the open door, right hand holding the bag chain near thigh; shoulders back, spine tall, head turned slightly toward camera.”,
“lighting_and_optics”: {
“key_fill”: “Soft, cool ambient daylight as key; gentle bounce/fill from snow and car surface.”,
“rim”: “Warm back rim from low sun reflecting off snow and trees for gentle golden highlights.”,
“lens”: “50–85mm full-frame look at f/2.2–2.8; shutter fast enough to freeze falling snow; eyes tack-sharp.”,
“bokeh”: “Subtle creamy bokeh from distant pines and door frame; clean speculars on car paint and boots.”
},
“color_grade”: {
“palette”: “Clean cool whites (snow, fur, hat, dress) contrasted with saturated candy-apple red (car, boots, gloves) and neutral greens from the pines.”,
“temperature”: “Cool overall ambient with slight warm highlights from sun (cool mids/shadows ~5200K look; warm highs ~4200K).”,
“contrast”: “High-key snow with firm, clean blacks; crisp yet natural contrast; restrained saturation (avoid neon).”,
“skin_tone”: “Natural and warm, never blue; preserve real texture (no plastic skin).”,
“finishing”: “Very light film grain acceptable; no color casts.”
},
“effects”: “Visible but delicate snow flurries across foreground and midground; optional faint breath condensation.”,
“negative_prompt”: [
“Do not alter face, hair, identity, or makeup.”,
“No brand logos or readable text/plates on the vehicle or handbag.”,
“No watermarks.”,
“No cartoon/CGI look, HDR halos, or harsh flash.”,
“No motion blur, warped anatomy, or extra/missing fingers.”,
“No excessive skin exposure or see-through fabric.”
],
“output”: “One photorealistic vertical 9:16 image matching the above description.”
}"
items.keywords: winter fashion, luxury suv, snow forest, red boots, faux fur jacket, high fashion, editorial shoot, snowfall, cinematic lighting, winter style, photorealistic, luxury lifestyle

The people is seated comfortably (sofa or modern cozy chair) in a pet-friendly room, slightly angled (3/4 view) for depth. They are interacting with the pet in a dynamic way.
Keep eye direction warm and engaging (toward camera OR toward the pet).
No stiff pose, no flat front-facing passport look.
BACKGROUND DETAILS (NON-TEXT)
A cheerful pet-friendly room with depth and warmth: shelves with pet decor, framed geometric art (no letters), a window glow, warm ambient lighting. Add soft bokeh depth-of-field so the people and pet pop. No readable signage, no logos, no text posters.
OBJECTS / PROPS (BUSY, LAYERED, PET-SPECIFIC — 12–18 ITEMS)
Fill the scene with 12–18 layered pet + cozy lifestyle objects, naturally scattered and overlapping like a collage (not neatly arranged). Include a mix from below:
pet bed
blanket pile
pillows (varied textures)
toys: ball, rope toy, squeaky toy, chew toy
feather wand / teaser toy (pet play prop on shelf)
treat jar (no label)
food bowl + water bowl
leash
harness
collar with a simple tag (no readable text)
grooming items: brush, small shampoo bottle shape, lint roller
small pet play tunnel
pet carrier or tote bag
small plant
Make the items feel "lived-in" and fun—some on the floor, some on a side table, some on shelves—slightly messy but aesthetically pleasing.
FRAMING & COLLAGE ELEMENTS
The illustration is framed with a hand-painted brushstroke border, with a few sticker-like elements overlapping the border for a collage feel. Stickers should be pet-themed icons (e.g., paw prints, heart shapes, bone silhouette, sparkle accents) — no text.
LIGHTING, COLOR, & QUALITY
Use bright, warm colors, soft lighting, clean sharp outlines, crisp edges, smooth gradients, glossy highlights, and a modern digital cartoon-illustration look. Keep the scene busy, colorful, and dynamic, not dark or minimal. The mood should feel cozy, joyful, and premium — like a stylish pet lover showing off their best friend.
